answer:
The probability of success in one throw is \( \frac{1}{3} \), so the probability of failure is \( \frac{2}{3} \).  
The probability of failing all three attempts is \( \left(\frac{2}{3}\right)^3 = \frac{8}{27} \).  
Thus, the probability of at least one success is \( 1 - \frac{8}{27} = \frac{19}{27} \).  

\boxed{D}
